mode: NEXUS Current System Intelligence static cartography
keyFindings: The app has two page surfaces: production Nexus Ops at / and style lab at /style-lab.
Most business UI density is concentrated in nexus-ops.tsx, nexus-graph.tsx, workflow-pro-surface.tsx, nexus-style-lab.tsx, nexus-store.ts, and state-sync.ts.
Backend route handlers are broad and mostly organized under /api/v1, with api-handler.ts acting as the main auth/idempotency/envelope/observability boundary.
Supabase is touched through browser, request-token, and admin/service-role client boundaries; local migrations define the durable table/RLS/RPC/storage spine.
Large files exceed 1000 lines and several exceed 3000 lines, so future changes should use responsibility inventory and migration maps before refactors.
